title: github-settings
description: Schema for .github-settings.yaml repo settings specs. REQUIRED org norms (KB-82) are pinned as const — a spec declaring any other value is invalid by construction, deterministically, independent of any LLM reading the file. Keep the const values in sync with the norm comments in templates/github-settings.yaml.

squash_title.$comment: REQUIRED org norm (KB-82): any other value drops [TICKET-ID] from single-commit squashes

squash_message.$comment: REQUIRED org norm (KB-82): any other value drops provenance trailers from squash bodies
